---
id: get-condition
title: "Get a condition definition"
description: "Retrieves a specific condition definition by id and version. Use to inspect condition logic and parameters before explaining or calibrating."
sidebar_label: "Get a condition definition"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api

---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a condition definition"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/conditions/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves a specific condition definition by id and version. Use to inspect condition logic and parameters before explaining or calibrating.
